description: The M1 feature-gate manifest. Every non-trivial integration is gated by a Dataverse environment variable. Secret variables hold a KEY VAULT REFERENCE only -- never a literal value (Infisical is the source-of-record; values injected at [RESERVED-FOR-USER]). The Code App READS gates, never writes them. M1 defaults are frozen here (Phase 0 prerequisite).

conventions.boolean: Dataverse env-var type 'Boolean'; stored as the strings 'true'/'false' when surfaced to flows; the Code App coerces.
conventions.secretType: Dataverse env-var type 'Secret' -> binds to an Azure Key Vault secret REFERENCE (vault + secret name + version). No secret literal in any artifact.
conventions.defaultVsCurrent: `defaultValue` ships in the unmanaged solution; `currentValue` is the per-environment override (left null here for non-secret, and ALWAYS null/reference-only for secrets).

variables.description: Gates the parser Function branch (Func_Parse / Flow_Parse). M1 default ON.

Gates the DVSA enrichment branch. Default OFF; activated per-environment via the current value (Dev currentValue=true — enrichment is live). Activation requires DVSA/DVLA creds + DVSA_TENANT_ID first.
Base URL of the deployed DVSA enrichment Function (set per environment at [DEPLOY-WITH-LOGIN]). Required alongside ENRICHMENT_ENABLED.
Gates the EVA Sentry REST path. M1 default OFF -- JSON drag-drop export is the M1 path + permanent fallback. The Code App disables the Sentry-API radio when false.
EVA Sentry base URL (same for test/prod; creds select the environment). Inert in M1.
EVA Sentry OAuth client id. KEY VAULT REFERENCE ONLY -- value injected by the user ([RESERVED-FOR-USER]).
EVA Sentry OAuth client secret. KEY VAULT REFERENCE ONLY -- never a literal; value injected by the user ([RESERVED-FOR-USER]).
When false, postcode.io is the address-normalisation path (M1). When true (M3), Azure Maps is selected.
Gates valuation evidence (Companion Report) enrichment. M1 default OFF (deferred).
Gates Copilot Studio integration. M1 default OFF.
Gates Document Intelligence / Read OCR if wrapped for registrationVisible / image AI. M1 default OFF (OCR-assist may run via the parser Function instead).

Phase-7 Box pivot (ADR-0012). The unlock: gates the custom Box REST connector + webhook receiver. Read by every Box flow as the outer guard, and by the Code App (read-only). Sibling to EVA_API_ENABLED. Default OFF; flipping true is [RESERVED-FOR-USER].
Phase-7 B1: gates folder + archival at case-creation. The box-folder-create child flow (invoked from intake at parse-confirm) reads it. Default OFF.
Phase-7 B2/B3: gates the File Request image chaser + webhook intake. Read by box-file-request-copy and consumed by the Code App chaser UI. Default OFF.

Phase-7 B4 RESERVED (link-not-embed): gates the optional Code App Box Embed iframe (/embed/s/{token}). The operator chose 'Open in Box' deep links, so this stays OFF; flipping it also requires the operator frame-src CSP edit. Read by the Code App only.

Phase-7 Wave-2/Phase-C reliability upgrade (Business Plus): gates the Box Metadata-Query path for the orphaned image-only intake. OUT OF SCOPE on the BASE BUSINESS start; inert until the metadata feature is enabled. Default OFF.

Phase-7 per-environment config: the archive ROOT Box folder id, supplied to CreateFolder (POST /2.0/folders) as parent.id when minting a Case/PO folder. Value is the per-environment current value set at activation (never a hardcoded live Box id), mirroring ENRICHMENT_API_BASE. Replaces the legacy per-flow BoxArchiveRootId parameter.

Phase-7 per-environment config: the hand-built image-chaser TEMPLATE File-Request id, supplied to CopyFileRequest (POST /2.0/file_requests/{id}/copy) as the path id. One id per form shape; the vehicle_registration capture field is baked into the template and cannot be varied by the copy. Value set at activation. The Code App reads non-empty as fileRequestTemplateConfigured.

notes: Frozen M1 defaults: PDF_MAPPER_ENABLED=true, ENRICHMENT_ENABLED=false (default OFF; Dev currentValue flipped to true at activation — enrichment is live in Dev), EVA_API_ENABLED=false, AZURE_MAPS_ENABLED=false, VALUATION_ENABLED=false, COPILOT_ENABLED=false, AZURE_VISION_ENABLED=false.

Frozen Phase-7 Box defaults (ADR-0012): BOX_API_ENABLED=false, BOX_FOLDER_AT_INTAKE_ENABLED=false, BOX_FILEREQUEST_ENABLED=false, BOX_EMBED_ENABLED=false (reserved, link-not-embed), BOX_METADATA_ENABLED=false. All five gates default OFF; flipping any to 'true' (the per-environment currentValue) is [RESERVED-FOR-USER].

ENRICHMENT_API_BASE, EVA_BASE_URL, BOX_FOLDER_ROOT_ID and BOX_FILE_REQUEST_TEMPLATE_ID are per-environment string values set at activation (defaultValue ''); they are NOT secrets and carry no hardcoded live id.

BOX_AI_ENABLED is deliberately NOT in this manifest — Box AI (Extract/Ask) is deferred to Phase C (metered AI Units). This Box set (5 gates + 2 config) is therefore NOT the complete Box feature set; add BOX_AI_ENABLED additively when Phase C is taken up.

Box secrets are Function-side Key Vault concerns, NOT Dataverse env-vars: the Box CCG client_secret + the webhook primary/secondary signature keys live in Key Vault and are read by the box-webhook Function (owned by azure-integration-engineer), never as a connection value or an env-var here.

All four secret references (EVA_CLIENT_ID/SECRET) point at Key Vault; gateway secrets (ce-mcp-gateway CLIENT_ID/SECRET) are owned by the azure agent's Function app settings, also Key Vault references.
